studies.title: The Kaia COPD software Application:  a digital therapeutic delivering PR to symptomatic COPD patients for self-management in the home setting – a randomized, controlled, multicentered and multinational clinical study.

Impact of a Smartphone application (KAIA COPD-App) in combination with Activity Monitoring as maintenance program following pulmonary rehabilitation in COPD : an international multi-centered randomised controlled trial

dtx_name: Kaia COPD: Meine aktive COPD Therapie
